properties.body:
NAVAREA XIX 60/14
SEISMIC SURVEY VESSEL POLACUS NADIA WILL CONDUCT SEISMIC SURVEY OPERATIONS BETWEEN THE FOLLOWING POSITIONS
A. 72-52.0N 036-17.2E
B. 72-23.9N 035-32.5E
C. 72-11.7N 036-55.3E
D. 72-39.5N 037-41.7E

POLARCUS NADIA IS TOWING 12 SEISMIC CABLES AND IS RESTRICTED IN HER ABILITY TO MANEUVER.
VESSELS ARE REQUESTED TO PROVIDE WIDE BERTH OF 7NM.
FOLLOWING VESSELS ARE IN ATTENDANCE; ARCTIC STAR, POLARIS AND OPAL.
